style_effects: Gentle sparkling dust trails drift lazily upward like bioluminescent pollen, dissolving into soft petal-shaped aura particles that pulse with a pastel pink and lavender glow. A delicate, heart-shaped aura radiates from its body in gentle waves, refracting light into iridescent rainbows around its vine-covered limbs. The lighting mood is warm and dreamy, bathed in a soft golden-hour glow that makes the petals shimmer like liquid crystal. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
